description_long: This is an adult male figure with a fit build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is dressed in a cropped, patchwork-style jacket over a bare torso, paired with fitted pants and ankle-high boots. The jacket features a geometric pattern with various rectangular segments, giving it a modern, urban look. His facial features are well-defined, and he has short, closely-cropped hair. The hands are relaxed and fingers are slightly spread, and the overall posture suggests a neutral, at-ease stance. The clothing and styling are contemporary, suitable for a city or street environment.
description: A fit adult male in a cropped, patchwork jacket, fitted pants, and boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The look is modern and urban, with short hair and a bare torso under the jacket.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bare torso, patchwork jacket, fitted pants, and boots, with arms outstretched and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the cropped length of the jacket, and the slim fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the patchwork jacket, the fit of the pants, and the back of the boots and head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: cropped patchwork jacket, fitted pants, ankle-high boots
